# Chapter 7: Reliability theory  (~110 pp)
- 7.1 Failure rate, MTBF, MTTR (12) · 7.2 Bathtub curve (8) · 7.3 Reliability functions and distributions (15) · 7.4 Series, parallel, k-of-n systems (15) · 7.5 Fault-tree and event-tree analysis (18) · 7.6 FMEA, FMECA (15) · 7.7 Common-cause failure (15) · 7.8 Failure section: redundancy that did not help (12)

**Archetype**: failure, balance. **Project**: build a fault tree for a household system (heating, water, internet); estimate MTBF. **Exercises**: 30.
